text: Thank you. Well very important point. Can you tell me how positive and negative polarizations and fourth and fifth density are used to cause work in consciousness? I am wrong. There is very little work in consciousness, in fourth and in fifth densities compared to the work done in third density, the work that is accomplished in positive forth is that work whereby the positive social memory complex having through slow stages harmoniously integrated itself goes forth to aid those of less positive orientation which seek their aid. Thus their service is their work and through this dynamic between the societal self and the other self, which is the object of love. This intensity continues until the appropriate intensity of the light may be welcomed. This is fourth density harvest within fourth density positive. This occurs during the process of harmonizing to the extent of forming the social memory complex. This causes some small catalyst and work to occur, but the great work of fourth density lies in the contact betwixt the societal self and less polarized other self. In a fourth density negative, much work is accomplished enduring the fighting for position which precedes the period of the social memory complex. There are opportunities to polarize negatively by control of other selves. Polarized other self in order to aid in a negative polarization in fifth density positive and negative the concept of work done through a potential difference is not particularly helpful as fifth density entities are again intensifying rather than potentiating. In positive, the fifth density complex uses sixth density teach learners to study the more illuminated understandings of unity, thus becoming more and more wise. Fifth density positive a social memory complexes often will choose to divide their service to others in two ways. For they fear the forgetting.

segment.segment: Can you tell me how positive and negative polarizations and fourth and fifth density are used to cause work in consciousness?

There is very little work in consciousness, in fourth and in fifth densities compared to the work done in third density, the work that is accomplished in positive forth is that work whereby the positive social memory complex having through slow stages harmoniously integrated itself goes forth to aid those of less positive orientation which seek their aid.
Thus their service is their work and through this dynamic between the societal self and the other self, which is the object of love.
This intensity continues until the appropriate intensity of the light may be welcomed.
This is fourth density harvest within fourth density positive.
This occurs during the process of harmonizing to the extent of forming the social memory complex.
This causes some small catalyst and work to occur, but the great work of fourth density lies in the contact betwixt the societal self and less polarized other self.

Polarized other self in order to aid in a negative polarization in fifth density positive and negative the concept of work done through a potential difference is not particularly helpful as fifth density entities are again intensifying rather than potentiating.
In positive, the fifth density complex uses sixth density teach learners to study the more illuminated understandings of unity, thus becoming more and more wise.
Fifth density positive a social memory complexes often will choose to divide their service to others in two ways.
